meta.description: Premium coffee and tea supplier in Qatar — SOLV.

footer.brandDescription: Premium coffee & tea supplier in Qatar, dedicated to bringing you the finest quality and exceptional service.

rich-flavor.title: Rich Flavor, Perfect Moments
rich-flavor.description: Discover our exclusive selection of premium coffee and tea blends, crafted for true taste lovers.
rich-flavor.imageAlt: Black coffee cup with steam, beans, and a gold cezve

latte-art.title: Slow Sips, Golden Rituals
latte-art.description: From silky espresso to delicate latte art, every cup is roasted and poured for depth, aroma, and calm.
latte-art.imageAlt: Latte art in a black cup with coffee beans and gold spoon

tea-moments.title: Leaves, Steam, Quiet Luxury
tea-moments.description: Explore refined tea blends and brewing rituals designed for evenings that linger a little longer.
tea-moments.imageAlt: Black teapot and teacup with steam and dried tea leaves

shopByCategory.title: Shop by Category
shopByCategory.description: Find the perfect coffee, tea, and accessories for every ritual.

deals.title: Hot Deals
deals.description: Special offers on our most loved products.

quality.title: Handpicked Quality For True Taste
quality.description: From the finest coffee beans to exquisite tea leaves, every product is chosen for purity, aroma and flavor.

premium-quality.title: Premium Quality
premium-quality.description: Carefully sourced from the world's best farms.

fast-delivery.title: Fast Delivery
fast-delivery.description: Quick and reliable delivery across Qatar.

dedicated-support.title: Dedicated Support
dedicated-support.description: We're here to help you every step of the way.

newsletter.title: Brew Your Perfect Moment
newsletter.description: Be the first to know about new arrivals, exclusive offers and brewing tips.
newsletter.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.title: Coffee & tea, chosen with care
hero.description: We bring premium coffee and tea to Qatar — for homes, cafés, and anyone who values a better cup.

story.title: A supplier built around true taste
story.p1: SOLV was founded in Qatar with a simple purpose: make exceptional coffee and tea easy to discover, order, and enjoy — without compromising on origin, freshness, or service.
story.p2: We work with trusted growers and producers, then curate every product for aroma, balance, and everyday excellence. From single-origin beans to refined tea leaves and thoughtful accessories, each item earns its place on our shelves.
story.p3: Whether you brew at home or supply a café, we deliver quality you can taste — and support you can rely on across Doha and beyond.

integrity.title: Sourced with Integrity
integrity.description: We partner with growers and producers who prioritize quality, consistency, and care at origin.

quality.title: Selected for Flavor
quality.description: Every lot is chosen for aroma, balance, and character — not just labels or trend.

delivery.title: Delivered Across Qatar
delivery.description: Reliable fulfilment from Doha outward, so freshness arrives when you need it.

support.title: Guided by People
support.description: Real support for homes, hospitality, and café partners — before and after you order.

journey.title: From origin to your cup
journey.description: A quiet, careful process behind every product we offer.

source.title: Source
source.description: We identify exceptional coffee and tea from respected growing regions around the world.

curate.title: Curate
curate.description: Each selection is evaluated for purity, aroma, and how it performs in real everyday brewing.

prepare.title: Prepare
prepare.description: Beans, blends, leaves, and accessories are prepared and packed to protect freshness and flavor.

deliver.title: Deliver
deliver.description: Orders reach homes and businesses across Qatar with clear service and dependable timing.

promise.title: Quality you can taste. Service you can trust.
promise.description: From the first sip to the last refill, SOLV is here to elevate the coffee and tea experience in Qatar — thoughtfully, consistently, and without the noise.

hero.title: Supply, delivery, and care for every brew
hero.description: From home kitchens to cafés and hospitality partners — SOLV supports Qatar with premium coffee, tea, and dependable service.

list.title: Services tailored to taste
list.description: Premium products, reliable logistics, and thoughtful guidance — so every order feels simple and intentional.

home-supply.title: Home & Office Supply
home-supply.description: Curated coffee, tea, and accessories for everyday brewing — delivered with freshness in mind.

hospitality.title: Café & Hospitality Supply
hospitality.description: Reliable product supply for cafés, hotels, and restaurants that need consistent quality at volume.

wholesale.title: Bulk & Wholesale Orders
wholesale.description: Larger quantities for businesses and events, with guidance on product fit and quantity planning.

delivery.title: Delivery Across Qatar
delivery.description: Dependable fulfilment from Doha outward so coffee and tea arrive when your schedule needs them.

gifting.title: Corporate & Gift Sets
gifting.description: Thoughtful coffee and tea gift sets for clients, teams, and special occasions — ready to impress.

consultation.title: Product Guidance
consultation.description: Help choosing the right roast, tea style, or accessory — for home setups or professional menus.

audience.title: Built for every kind of coffee & tea moment
audience.description: Whether you brew for one or fill a busy floor, SOLV adapts to how you work.

homes.title: Homes & Offices
homes.description: Premium everyday coffee and tea with simple ordering and reliable delivery.

cafes.title: Cafés & Restaurants
cafes.description: Consistent supply and product guidance so your cups stay true service after service.

hospitality.title: Hotels & Events
hospitality.description: Scalable fulfilment for guest experiences, corporate gifting, and special occasions.

process.title: Simple from first message to first delivery
process.description: A clear path to getting the right coffee and tea into your space.

share.title: Share your needs
share.description: Tell us what you brew, how often you need it, and who you serve.

curate.title: Get a curated plan
curate.description: We recommend products, quantities, and options that fit your setup.

confirm.title: Confirm & schedule
confirm.description: Approve your order, delivery window, and any recurring supply needs.

enjoy.title: Receive & enjoy
enjoy.description: Your coffee and tea arrive carefully packed — with support whenever you need it.

support.title: Real people. Clear answers.
support.description: Questions about roast profiles, tea selections, wholesale timing, or gift orders — our team is here to help before and after every purchase.

cta.title: Ready for better coffee & tea service?
cta.description: Tell us what you need — supply, delivery, wholesale, or gifts — and we'll shape a simple plan around it.
cta.label: Contact Our Team

hero.title: Let's talk coffee, tea, and supply
hero.description: Questions, wholesale requests, or gift orders — reach the SOLV team in Qatar and we'll help you find the right next step.

form.title: We're here to help
form.description: Share a few details and our team will get back to you during business hours.
form.name: Full name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thank you — your message has been received. We'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Could not send your message. Please try again.

info.title: Contact details
info.description: Prefer to call, message, or visit? Use the channels below — we respond Mon to Sat.

login.title: Sign in to SOLV
login.description: Access your account to track orders and manage your details.
login.validation: Please enter your email and password.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Register with your email. We'll send a code to verify and open your account.
register.name: Full name
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

verify.title: Enter your code
verify.description: We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it below to open your account.
verify.validation: Enter your email and the 6-digit code.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptyHint: Add coffee, tea, or accessories from the shop to get started.

shop.title: Shop
shop.description: Premium coffee, tea, accessories, and gift sets — curated for homes and hospitality across Qatar.
shop.loadErrorHint: Check your connection or try again shortly.

checkout.title: Complete your order
checkout.description: Confirm your details and delivery preference. Payment is cash on delivery.
checkout.emptyDescription: Add products from the shop before checking out.
checkout.successDescription: Thank you. Pay cash on delivery when your order arrives. Our team will contact you to confirm timing.
checkout.paymentNote: All orders are cash on delivery.
checkout.placeError: Could not place order. Try again.
checkout.agree: By placing your order you agree to be contacted for confirmation.

cod.label: Cash on delivery
cod.description: Pay in cash when your order arrives.

account.title: My account
account.heroDescription: Manage your details and review your order history.

password.heading: Password
password.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
